# Transcrição: 3. Don't Know What I Want - What Brought You Out 

- **Fonte:** 3. Don't Know What I Want - What Brought You Out 
- **Duração:** 00:10

## [00:00 - 00:10]

Customer comes in and says, look, I don't know what I want. You'll be wasting your time. I just want to look around. Excellent. So let me ask you, John, what brought you out today to look around?
